---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature should do.

## Use Case
Describe the problem this feature solves or use case it addresses.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how this feature should work.

## Alternative Solutions (Optional)
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, wireframes, or examples about the feature here.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
